title: LithiumKOTH
description: A koth plugin with customizability, and easability
body:
This plugin is a koth plugin allowing players to fight over a specified reward.

-- Features --

Editable koth through an ingame gui, allowing the user to edit time between each koth, the duration of the koth, the rewards.

how to use:

/koth wand
select two positions as it were worldedit
/koth create <name>
/koth edit <name>
if you don't understand how to use this plugin hit me up on discord

"moraldemocracy"


Permissions

permissions:
  koth.admin:
    description: Allows access to all KOTH admin commands
    default: op
  koth.wand:
    description: Allows getting the KOTH wand
    default: op
  koth.create:
    description: Allows creating KOTHs
    default: op
  koth.edit:
    description: Allows editing KOTHs
    default: op
  koth.reward:
    description: Allows managing KOTH rewards
    default: op
  koth.start:
    description: Allows starting KOTHs
    default: op
  koth.stop:
    description: Allows stopping KOTHs
    default: op
  koth.list:
    description: Allows listing KOTHs
    default: true


    PlaceholderAPI Support:

%koth_holder% - Current holder name
%koth_time% - Time left (seconds)
%koth_time_formatted% - Formatted time (Xh Xm Xs)
%koth_name% - Active KOTH name
%koth_active% - true/false
